adaptive_shifter.name: Adaptive Shifter
description: ## Adaptive Shifter
‹SOURCE Distant Realms/12›

Rather than emulate other animals entirely, some shifters learn to reshape their forms on the fly in response to a range of stimuli, rarely taking on a new form for longer than necessary to overcome a challenge.

::ab[Adaptive Claws (Su)]{icon=melee ability="When activating her *shifter claws* ability in her natural form, an adaptive shifter can instead manifest a single bite attack that deals bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage; a gore attack that deals piercing damage; or a tail slap that deals bludgeoning damage. This natural attack otherwise deals damage as the shifter's claws." alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Reactive Aspect (Su)]{icon=def-boost useLMod=shifter~Wisdom3 ability="An adaptive shifter gains the ability to change parts of her body to avoid harm, gain a physical advantage, or overcome an obstacle. By activating this ability, either as an @HLimmediate_action or as a @HLswift_action, an adaptive shifter gains the benefits of one of her *reactive forms* until the beginning of her next turn (see below). An adaptive shifter can assume only one *reactive form* at a time. Activating a new *reactive form* (or forms) ends all *reactive forms* currently manifested." imp9="An adaptive shifter gains the benefits of up to two *reactive forms* whenever she uses this ability." imp14="She can assume up to three forms." imp20="She learns all *reactive forms* and doubles her effective Wisdom modifier for the purpose of calculating her uses of *reactive aspect* per day." replace="Shifter aspect~chimeric aspect~greater chimeric aspect~final aspect"}

::ab[Reactive Form (Su)]{head icon=power ability="An adaptive shifter learns two *reactive forms* from the list below." incrementOrd="An adaptive shifter~2~2~3" incrementDesc="learns her~chooses her~gains her" incrementEnd=" *reactive form.*" special="Forms marked with an asterisk (&#42&) are *lasting forms.* An adaptive shifter can spend two uses of *reactive aspect* to increase a *lasting form's* duration to 1 minute. Forms not marked with an asterisk always last only until the beginning of her next turn."}
::ab[Adaptive Defense]{next icon=def passive="When assuming this form, the adaptive shifter chooses one saving throw and gains a competence bonus on the selected save equal to her Wisdom modifier."}

::ab[Aligned Adaptation&#42&]{next icon=magic-boost passive="When assuming this form, the adaptive shifter chooses one alignment within one step of her own alignment on either the law/chaos axis or the good/evil axis. All spells, effects, and magic items affect the adaptive shifter as though that were her actual alignment." imp10="Her natural weapon attacks overcome damage reduction as if they were weapons of her assumed alignment."}
::ab[Aquatic Form&#42&]{next icon=power passive="The adaptive shifter gains a swim speed equal to her base speed, and she can breathe underwater."}
::ab[Climbing Form&#42&]{next icon=power passive="The adaptive shifter gains a climb speed equal to her base speed."}
::ab[Durable Form]{next icon=def prereq="8th-level shifter" passive="The adaptive shifter gains DR 5/adamantine." incrementPlain="This becomes~8~2~6" incrementDesc=DR incrementEnd="/adamantine."}

::ab[Evasive Form&#42&]{next icon=power-def-boost passive="The adaptive shifter gains ‹umr/compression›, a +4 dodge bonus to her CMD against grapple combat maneuvers, and a competence bonus equal to her Wisdom modifier on Escape Artist checks."}
::ab[Giant Form&#42&]{next icon=boost passive="The adaptive shifter increases in size, as per ‹spell/enlarge person›." special="The adaptive shifter can assume this form only as a @HLswift_action."}

::ab[Resistant Form&#42&]{next icon=def passive="When assuming this form, the adaptive shifter chooses acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage. She gains ‹umr/resistance› to the chosen damage type equal to 5 plus ‹misc/half› her level." special="She can learn this form a second time, increasing the resistance granted to 10 plus her level."}

::ab[Restoring Form]{next icon=aid passive="The adaptive shifter regains 1d8 hit points. For every 4 levels she has, the number of hit points she regains increases by 1d8." incrementPlain="This increases~0~4" incrementDesc=to incrementEnd="d8." special="The adaptive shifter can assume this form only as a @HLswift_action."}

::ab[Scouting Form&#42&]{next icon=boost-power passive="The adaptive shifter gains a competence bonus equal to her Wisdom modifier on Stealth checks, and she gains the benefits of the shifter's *trackless step* ability." imp12="She can use Stealth to hide, even if she does not have cover or concealment (but not if observed)."}

::ab[Sensory Form&#42&]{next icon=power-boost passive="The adaptive shifter gains low-light vision and ‹umr/scent›." special="She can learn this form a second time to also gain darkvision with a range of 60 feet and a competence bonus on Perception checks equal to her Wisdom modifier."}

::ab[Sky Hunter Form&#42&]{next icon=power prereq="6th-level shifter" passive="The adaptive shifter gains a fly speed equal to her base speed with average maneuverability." special="She can learn this form a second time, increasing her fly speed by 20 feet and improving her maneuverability to good."}

::ab[Spiked Form&#42&]{next icon=def-ranged passive="The adaptive shifter grows spines over her body. Any foe striking her with an unarmed strike or a melee natural weapon takes an amount of piercing damage equal to the base damage of her *shifter claws,* which ignores any damage reduction her *shifter claws* would ignore." special="She can learn this form a second time, allowing her to fling her spines as thrown natural weapons that deal piercing damage, have a range increment of 30 feet, and allow her to make multiple attacks with her spines as part of a full attack; these otherwise deal damage and overcome damage reduction as her *shifter claws.*"}
::ab[Sprinting Form&#42&]{next icon=boost passive="The adaptive shifter's base speed increases by 20 feet."}
::ab[Stretching Form]{next icon=melee passive="The adaptive shifter's reach with natural weapons increases by 5 feet."}

::ab[Lasting Adaptation (Su)]{l=5 icon=power ability="An adaptive shifter can spend 1 minute willing her body to adapt in a more enduring way. At the end of the minute, she expends two uses of her *reactive aspect* and selects one *lasting form* she knows. She assumes this form and can maintain it until she regains her daily uses of *reactive aspect* or uses this ability again. This adaptation does not count against the maximum number of forms she can assume at once." special="She can select a form that has a minimum level only if her character level is at least 3 higher than the minimum level." imp15="The adaptive shifter can maintain up to two *lasting adaptations* simultaneously, spending an additional minute and two uses of her *reactive aspect* each time she assumes a new adaptation." replace="Wild empathy~track~woodland stride~trackless step"}

::ab[Unfettered Wild Shape (Su)]{l=6 icon=magic ability="An adaptive shifter gains the ability to turn into other creatures. This functions as a ‹class/druid«'s› *wild shape* ability, except she does not gain the ability to turn into an elemental. The shifter's effective druid level is equal to her shifter level." special="For abilities that function based on *&quot&uses of wild shape,&quot&* each hour of unfettered *wild shape* counts as a use." replace="Wild shape" useInc="shifter~2" useNC=1}

dragonblood_shifter.name: Dragonblood Shifter
description: ## Dragonblood Shifter
‹SOURCE Wilderness Origins/5›
Dragonblood shifters draw upon the inherent strength and majesty of the true dragons, gaining a measure of their powers from their association.
::ab[Dragon Attacks]{icon=melee ability="A shifter that uses @HLalternate_natural_attacks can choose from Bite (B, P, S), Tail slap (B), or Wing (B)."}

:::ab{icon=def-power-cone title="Draconic Aspect (Su)" action="Swift Action" replace="Shifter aspect" useL=shifter3 useUnit=minute useNC=1 special="The shifter can select a different dragon type every time she uses this ability, but she must end her current draconic aspect and activate this ability again in order to change her chosen dragon type." imp5="The energy resistance granted by the dragonblood shifter's draconic aspect increases to 10." imp10="The energy resistance granted by the dragonblood shifter's draconic aspect increases to 15, and she gains a ‹umr/breath weapon› of her energy type that deals 1d6 points of damage per shifter level within a 30-foot cone. A target can attempt a Reflex save (DC = 10 + half the dragonblood shifter's level + her Charisma modifier) to reduce damage by half. The dragonblood shifter can use her breath weapon once per day." imp15="The energy resistance granted by the dragonblood shifter's draconic aspect increases to 20, and she can use her breath weapon twice per day." imp20="The dragonblood shifter becomes ‹umr/immune› to the energy type that corresponds to her selected dragon type while in her draconic aspect. In addition, she gains spell resistance equal to 10 + her shifter level, and she can use her breath weapon three times per day."}

A dragonblood shifter can temporarily imbue her body with draconic majesty. When activating this ability, the shifter must select one of the chromatic or metallic dragon types from the table below. Her draconic aspect abilities grant resistances and deal a type of damage based on the chosen dragon type. While shifted into this form, she gains the ‹umr/scent› ability and energy ‹umr/resistance› 5 against the energy type that corresponds to her selected dragon type.
| Dragon Type | Energy Type |
| Black | Acid |
| Blue | Electricity |
| Green | Acid |
| Red | Fire |
| White | Cold |
| Brass | Fire |
| Bronze | Electricity |
| Copper | Acid |
| Gold | Fire |
| Silver | Cold |

::ab[Wyrmshifter (Su)]{l=9 icon=def-down flavor="A dragonblood shifter can push her form closer to that of a true dragon." order=pau passive="She gains a +2 racial bonus on saving throws against sleep and paralysis effects." ability="She does not gain the *wild shape* ability until 9th level. When using the ability, she takes on the form of a true dragon; this ability functions as ‹spell/form of the dragon I› instead of ‹spell/beast shape II›." special="For abilities that function based on uses of *wild shape,* each minute of this ability counts as a use." useLMod=shifter~Wisdom useNC=1 useUnit=minute alter="Wild shape" replace="Chimeric aspect"}

::ab[Improved Wyrmshifter (Su)]{l=14 icon=def-boost flavor="A dragonblood shifter's ties to her draconic abilities grow stronger." passive="Her bonus on saves against sleep and paralysis effects increases to +4." ability="Her *wild shape* ability now functions as ‹spell/form of the dragon II›, and she can use it for a number of minutes each day equal to twice her shifter level + her Wisdom modifier, though it still must be used in 1-minute increments." replace="Greater chimeric aspect" order=pa}

::ab[Greater Wyrmshifter (Su)]{l=20 icon=def-boost flavor="A dragonblood shifter's tie to her draconic abilities reaches its peak." order=pa passive="She becomes immune to sleep and paralysis effects." ability="She can use *wild shape* to transform into a dragon for a number of hours each day equal to her shifter level + her Wisdom modifier. This duration does not need to be consecutive, but it must be spent in 1-hour increments." special="For abilities that function based on uses of *wild shape,* each hour of this ability counts as a use." replace="Final aspect"}

elementalist_shifter.name: Elementalist Shifter
description: ## Elementalist Shifter
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/78›

Rather than drawing power from bestial aspects, elementalist shifters channel power from the Inner Sphere and can take on powerful elemental forms at the cost of the greater diversity available to traditional shifters. Although the elementalist shifter's powers seem more outlandish and supernatural than those of others of their kind, they remain equally immersed in the druidic traditions; their focus is simply rooted in expressions of nature found in extraplanar regions: the planes of Air, Earth, Fire, and Water.
::ab[Languages]{icon=power info="An elementalist shifter adds Aquan, Auran, Ignan, and Terran to her list of available bonus languages." alter=Languages}

::ab[Elemental Aspect (Su)]{l=1 icon=power choice="An elementalist shifter chooses one elemental aspect (‹‹see below/#elemental-aspects››) rather than a *shifter aspect.* This ability otherwise functions as *shifter aspect.*" incrementOrd="She gains~0~5" incrementDesc=her~a incrementEnd=" elemental aspect." incrementMax=16 alter="Shifter aspect"}

::ab[Elemental Speech (Su)]{icon=power ability="When in her *elemental aspect,* an elementalist shifter gains the benefit of ‹spell/tongues› with creatures of the elemental subtype that matches her *elemental aspect.*" replace="Wild empathy"}

::ab[Elemental Strike (Su)]{l=1 icon=melee swift="An elementalist shifter can charge her melee attacks with elemental energy. The elementalist shifter can charge her attacks only with an element she has chosen with *elemental aspect.* Once charged, each melee attack the elementalist shifter makes until the start of her next turn deal additional 1d6 points of energy damage based on the element she chooses when taking this action (see ‹‹Elemental Aspects/#elemental-aspects›› below)." increment="This additional damage~0~4" incrementEnd="d6 points of energy damage." special="An elementalist shifter can't use *elemental strike* while under a polymorph effect." replace="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Elemental Form (Su)]{l=4 icon=magic-down ability="When an elementalist shifter uses *wild shape,* she is instead affected as if by ‹spell/elemental body I›, but she gains only the benefits listed in her *elemental aspect.* While in an *elemental form,* the elementalist shifter can speak only the elemental language associated with that form, and she can do so only if she knows it." alter="Wild shape"}

::ab[Omnielementalist (Su)]{head l=9 icon=boost ability="An elementalist shifter can fuse two *elemental forms* together, gaining combined powers of the different aspects and manifesting them in ways that bring to mind powerful natural weather phenomena. When the elementalist shifter takes on one minor form each from two of her *elemental aspects,* she gains an additional ability as long as she maintains the form. The effects of the abilities depend on the elemental combination, as detailed below." replace="Chimeric aspect~greater chimeric aspect"}

::ab[Ash Storm (Su)]{next icon=def ability="By combining air and fire, the elementalist shifter surrounds herself with a storm of swirling ash, granting her a 20% miss chance against ranged attacks."}

::ab[Downpour (Su)]{next icon=magic ability="The elementalist shifter combines the powers of air and water to generate a torrential downpour in her square and squares adjacent to her. This rain automatically extinguishes all nonmagical fires in her square and squares adjacent to her (including flames on creatures that have caught on fire). It also has a chance to extinguish ongoing magical fire (but not instantaneous magical fire effects such as ‹spell/fireball›) within or that enters the area, as if the elementalist shifter had cast ‹spell/dispel magic›, using her elementalist shifter level as her caster level for the effect."}

::ab[Mudslide (Su)]{next icon=aura ability="Combining the elements of earth and water causes the elementalist shifter to generate an aura of mud. This mud extends out to all squares adjacent to her and counts as ‹rule/difficult terrain›; it moves with her and vanishes when she ends her *elemental aspect.*"}

::ab[Sandstorm (Su)]{next icon=aura ability="Combining the high winds of air and fine particulates of earth produces a sandstorm that extends out to a radius of 20 feet from the elementalist shifter. All ‹rule/light level«s› in the area diminish by one step, and creatures caught in the effect take 1d6 points of nonlethal damage each round they remain within the *sandstorm.*"}

::ab[Steam Cloud (Su)]{next icon=aura ability="When the elementalist shifter enters a minor form of fire and water at the same time, the heat of fire and moisture of water generate an explosive area of steam around her out to a radius of 20 feet as per ‹spell/obscuring mist›. The mist remains in place until she ends her *elemental aspect;* it doesn't move with her."}

::ab[Volcanic Stride (Su)]{next icon=magic standard="By combining earth and fire, the elementalist shifter can damage the ground around herself. She can deform a region of natural or artificial rock in her space, turning it into difficult terrain and causing creatures that pass through it to take an amount of fire damage equal to that dealt by her *elemental strike* with no save. Affected terrain remains transformed until the shifter ends her *elemental aspect.*"}
::h3[Elemental Aspects]{jl}

Elementalist shifters do not infuse their bodies with bestial qualities taken from animal aspects. Rather, they take into themselves raw elemental power from the planes of Air, Earth, Fire, and Water. The following aspects are used by the elementalist shifter archetype; they cannot be selected as aspects by other shifters.

::ab[Air]{icon=power head info="You take on the power of an air elemental, gaining the ability to fly and to control powerful gusts of wind. You take inspiration from the patterns of clouds in the sky, the tumultuous fury of the storm, and the gentle caress of a cooling breeze. Flying creatures, such as bats and birds, are your favorites. Spring is your favored season - a time when storms bring freshness to the world but that lacks the brutality of winter's devastation."}
::ab[Minor Form]{icon=boost next ability="You gain a +2 enhancement bonus to your Dexterity score." imp8="This bonus increases to +4." imp15="This bonus increases to +6."}

::ab[Major Form]{icon=magic-def next ability="Your shape changes to that of a ‹monster/Medium air elemental›. While you are in this form, you gain a fly speed of 60 feet (average maneuverability) and airborne creatures take a -1 penalty on attack and damage rolls against you." imp8="Your fly speed increases to 100 feet (perfect) and you gain the ability to transform yourself into a whirlwind as a standard action for 1 round per 2 shifter levels you have. This otherwise functions as per the ‹umr/whirlwind› universal monster rule." imp15="You gain ‹feat/Improved Natural Attack› with your slam."}

::ab[Earth]{icon=power head info="You take on the power of an earth elemental, gaining the ability to burrow through the earth and deliver powerful blows. You take comfort in caverns, mountainous regions, and areas rent by canyons and chasms, and you feel a deep kinship to burrowing animals of all types. Be it the soothing feel of fresh topsoil or the devastating fury of an earthquake, you understand the raw power of earth. Your favored season is fall - the traditional time of the harvest, when bounty from the earth is offered."}
::ab[Minor Form]{icon=magic next ability="You gain a +2 enhancement bonus to your Constitution score." imp8="This bonus increases to +4." imp15="This bonus increases to +6."}

::ab[Major Form]{icon=magic-boost-down next ability="Your shape changes to that of a ‹monster/Medium earth elemental›. While you are in this form, your base speed is reduced to 20 feet, but you gain a burrow speed of 10 feet, and you gain a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls if both you and your target are touching the ground. If the target is airborne or waterborne, you take a -4 penalty on attack and damage rolls against it. These modifiers also apply to ‹rule/bull rush› and ‹rule/overrun› combat maneuvers, whether you are initiating or resisting these kinds of attacks." imp8="Your burrow speed increases to 20 feet and you gain ‹umr/earth glide› as per the universal monster rule." imp15="You gain Improved Natural Attack with your slam."}

::ab[Fire]{icon=power head info="You take on the power of a fire elemental, becoming a being of living flame that can burn enemies and move with great speed. You enjoy regions where precipitation rarely intrudes, such as desert landscapes and dry savannas, but the slopes of volcanoes hold the greatest majesty to you. You enjoy the companionship of swiftly moving creatures and those who enjoy basking in the sun, for you empathize with their appreciation of the daytime's warmth. Forest fires are things of beauty to you, yet you respect fire and would never think to wantonly inflict it upon the natural world. Summer is your favorite season, for this is a time of heat waves and blistering sunny days."}
::ab[Minor Form]{icon=magic next ability="You gain a +2 enhancement bonus to your Dexterity score." imp8="This bonus increases to +4." imp15="This bonus increases to +6."}

::ab[Major Form]{icon=magic-def-down-power next ability="Your shape changes to that of a ‹monster/Medium fire elemental›. While you are in this form, your base speed changes to 50 feet and you gain ‹umr/immunity› to fire, ‹umr/vulnerability› to cold, and the ‹umr/burn› special attack as per the universal monster rule, dealing damage equal to your slam attack whenever a creature fails its Reflex save against that ability." imp8="You gain Improved Natural Attack with your slam." imp15="You deal fire damage equal to double your slam damage against opponents that fail their saves against your burn ability."}

::ab[Water]{icon=power head info="You take on the power of a water elemental, gaining the ability to move swiftly in water, rain down crashing blows on your enemies, and transform into a swirling vortex. You identify with aquatic animals of all types, be they water-breathing creatures such as fish, amphibians such as newts or frogs, or air-breathing mammals such as whales or walruses. The unrelenting churn of waves on the shoreline, the soothing babble of a gentle stream, and the pounding kiss of a deluge of rain all bring joy to your heart. Your favored season is winter, for it is at this time that the most powerful of storms bring water to all the world."}
::ab[Minor Form]{icon=magic next ability="You gain a +2 enhancement bonus to your Strength score." imp8="This bonus increases to +4." imp15="This bonus increases to +6."}

::ab[Major Form]{icon=magic-boost-down-magic next ability="Your shape changes to that of a ‹monster/Medium water elemental›. While you are in this form, your base speed is reduced to 20 feet but you gain a swim speed of 60 feet, and if both you and your target are touching water, you also gain a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls. If the target is touching the ground, you take a -4 penalty on attack and damage rolls against it. These modifiers apply to bull rush and overrun combat maneuvers, whether you are initiating or resisting these kinds of attacks." imp8="Your swim speed increases to 90 feet, your touch automatically extinguishes nonmagical flames of size Large or smaller, and you can dispel magical fires as per ‹spell/dispel magic› using your shifter level as your effective caster level." imp15="You gain Improved Natural Attack with your slam and the *vortex* special ability, which functions identically to the air aspect's *whirlwind* ability but can form only underwater and cannot leave the water."}

feyform_shifter.name: Feyform Shifter
description: ## Feyform Shifter
‹SOURCE Wilderness Origins/6›
Feyform shifters are intimately linked to the First World, and can draw from it to gain otherworldly powers.
::ab[Fey]{icon=melee ability="A shifter that uses @HLalternate_natural_attacks can choose from Bite (B, P, S) and Sting (P)."}

::ab[Fey Aspect (Su)]{icon=magic-def swift="A feyform shifter can take on a First World aspect and assume fey traits. While in this form, she gains low-light vision (or darkvision with a range of 30 feet, if she already has low-light vision) and DR 1/cold iron. Her body outline becomes indistinct; she is treated as though she has ‹rule/concealment›, except that she cannot use this concealment to attempt Stealth checks." useL=shifter3 useUnit=minute useNC=1 imp5="The feyform shifter's DR increases to 2/cold iron, and she grows a pair of butterfly-like wings that grant her a fly speed of 30 feet with average maneuverability." imp10="The feyform shifter's DR increases to 5/cold iron, and she gains a +4 bonus on saving throws against enchantment spells and effects." imp15="The feyform shifter's DR increases to 7/cold iron, and her fly speed maneuverability increases to good." imp20="The feyform shifter's DR increases to 10/cold iron. She becomes resistant to movement-impairing effects (as ‹spell/freedom of movement›) and gains spell resistance equal to 10 + her level." replace="Shifter aspect and all improvements to it"}

::ab[Fey Shape (Su)]{l=4 icon=magic ability="A feyform shifter can use her *wild shape* ability to become a fey creature. The fey shifter must spend at least one use of *wild shape* to transform into a fey creature; this ability functions as ‹spell/fey form I›, except that it lasts for only 1 minute per use of *wild shape* spent." special="Using fey shape or reverting back is a @HLstandard_action that does not cause attacks of opportunity." imp8="This ability instead functions as ‹spell/fey form II›." imp10="This ability functions as ‹spell/fey form III›." imp14="This functions as ‹spell/fey form IV›." alter="Wild shape"}

::ab[Fey Shifter (Su)]{l=9 icon=boost ability="A feyform shifter gains a second *shifter aspect,* chosen from the animal aspects normally available to shifters. When she uses her *shifter aspect* ability to take on her fey aspect, she can choose a second aspect and assume the minor form of that aspect, alongside her fey aspect, allowing her to combine her fey aspect with the animal aspects available to her." alter="Chimeric aspect"}

::ab[Greater Fey Shifter (Su)]{l=14 icon=boost ability="A feyform shifter gains a third *aspect.* When she uses her *shifter aspect* ability to take on her fey aspect, she can choose two aspects and assume the minor form of each aspect, alongside her fey aspect." alter="Greater chimeric aspect"}

::ab[Final Aspect (Su)]{l=20 icon=boost ability="A feyform shifter gains access to a fourth *aspect.* When she uses *shifter aspect,* she can assume the minor forms of all her aspects in addition to her fey aspect, and she can use her major and minor forms at will." alter="Final aspect"}

fiendflesh_shifter.name: Fiendflesh Shifter
description: ## Fiendflesh Shifter
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/80›

By forging dark pacts with extraplanar forces, fiendflesh shifters invoke sinister powers to assume the strengths of daemons, demons, or devils. Fiendflesh shifters care nothing for the natural world and are instead consumed by an ever-growing lust for power at any price. To other shifters, the fiendflesh shifter is often viewed as a monster herself - an intrusion into the natural order of things and a foe who must be sought out and destroyed. Very few druids will ever willingly ally with fiendflesh shifters; this leaves these outcasts to live bitter, lonely lives or to seek out fiendish cults or other abhorrent faiths for support and companionship.
::ab[Alignment]{icon=warning info="A fiendflesh shifter must be evil in alignment. If the fiendflesh shifter becomes nonevil, she loses all powers granted by this archetype." alter=Alignment}

::ab[Infernal Claws (Ex)]{icon=melee flavor="A fiendflesh shifter's claws are infused with the unholy power of the evil Outer Planes." l1="A fiendflesh *shifter's claws* are treated as evil weapons for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction. This ability otherwise functions as the *shifter claws* class feature." alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Fiendish Aspect (Su)]{l=1 icon=magic-power-melee-def swift="A fiendflesh shifter can temporarily transform her body into an amalgam of otherworldly evil creatures. While in this form, the fiendflesh shifter gains darkvision out to a range of 60 feet (or doubles the range of her darkvision if she already has it), a gore natural attack that deals 1d6 points of damage (1d4 points of damage if the shifter is Small), and DR 1/good." useL=shifter3 useUnit=minute useNC=1 imp5="The fiendflesh shifter's DR increases to 2/good and she also grows a pair of bat-like wings when in her *fiendish aspect,* granting her a fly speed of 30 feet with average maneuverability." imp10="The fiendflesh shifter's DR increases to 5/good, and the electricity and fire resistance provided by her *fiendish resilience* ability (see below) doubles while she's in her *fiendish aspect.*" imp15="The fiendflesh shifter's DR increases to 7/good and her fly speed increases to 60 feet." imp20="The fiendflesh shifter's DR increases to 10/good. She also gains ‹umr/immunity› to electricity and fire and spell resistance equal to 15 + her shifter level." replace="Wild shape~shifter aspect"}

::ab[Fiendish Resilience (Su)]{l=2 icon=def passive="A fiendflesh shifter gains a +1 natural armor bonus to her AC and ‹umr/resistance› 5 to electricity and fire, but only while unencumbered and either wearing no armor or wearing light or medium nonmetal armor." repeat="The natural armor bonus increases by 1.~4~8" incrementPlain="Her resistance to electricity and fire~0~8~10~5" replace="Defensive instinct"}

::ab[Chimeric Fiend (Su)]{head l=9 icon=def ability="When a fiendflesh shifter uses her *fiendish aspect* ability, she can gain an additional ability from the list below. The fiendflesh shifter can change which ability she gains each time she uses *fiendish aspect.*." replace="Chimeric aspect"}
::ab[Daemon]{next icon=def passive="Acid resistance 10 and a +4 profane bonus on saves against disease."}
::ab[Demon]{next icon=def passive="The shifter's electricity resistance doubles."}
::ab[Devil]{next icon=def passive="The shifter's fire resistance doubles."}
::ab[Greater Chimeric Fiend (Su)]{head l=14 icon=power ability="A fiendflesh shifter's *chimeric fiend* ability grants her additional bonuses as noted below." replace="Greater chimeric aspect"}
::ab[Daemon]{next icon=boost-def passive="The shifter gains a +4 enhancement bonus to her Constitution score and immunity to disease."}
::ab[Demon]{next icon=boost passive="The shifter gains a +4 enhancement bonus to her Strength score and increases the damage die of all natural attacks ‹misc/by one step›."}
::ab[Devil]{next icon=boost-power passive="The shifter gains a +4 enhancement bonus to her Dexterity score and ‹umr/see in darkness› as per the universal monster rule."}

holy_beast.name: Holy Beast
description: ## Holy Beast
‹SOURCE Heroes of Golarion/12›

Thousands of gods are venerated in Vudra, and devoted followers might have personal relationships with their chosen deities. Holy beast shifters pledge to hunt down their deity's enemies to earn that deity's blessing. These shifters tend to take on the aspect of their deity's sacred animal, and many of them seek to destroy ‹family/rakshasa«s›.
::prereq{other="Must worship a deity"}

::ab[Blessed Claws (Su)]{icon=melee-boost ability="This ability functions as the *shifter's claws* class feature, except the holy beast shifter's default claws are long and thin, dealing piercing damage." imp3="Her claws are treated as one type of aligned weapon (chaotic, evil, good, or lawful) within one step of her deity's alignment in addition to ignoring DR/cold iron, DR/magic, and DR/silver. If multiple alignment components are available to the holy beast, she selects one; this choice cannot be changed later." alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Divine Fury (Su)]{icon=power flavor="A holy beast shifter focuses entirely on hunting down specific outsiders on behalf of her deity." ability="She gains the ranger's ‹ability/favored enemy› class feature, except she can select only an outsider type from the *favored enemy* table. The bonus against her *favored enemy* is equal to 1 + ‹misc/one-fifth› of her shifter level." repeat="She can forgo gaining an additional *shifter aspect* to instead gain an additional outsider type as her *favored enemy.*~5~5" imp5="Her bonuses from the *favored enemy* feature against new outsider types chosen in this way are equal to the bonus for the type chosen at 1st level." replace="Wild empathy~track~woodland stride~trackless step"}

leafshifter.name: Leafshifter
description: ## Leafshifter
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/18›

Rather than assume aspects taken from the traits of natural animals, a leafshifter transforms into plant-animal hybrids that resemble ‹monster/living topiar«ies<y›. This affords the leafshifter the savage power of the animal kingdom while also granting her the strength and timelessness of plant life.
::prereq{r=Ghoran}

::ab[Shifter's Slam (Ex)]{icon=melee ability="This ability functions as the *shifter claws* class feature, except the leafshifter gains two slam attacks instead of two claw attacks. These slam attacks are made with her arms, which are covered in jagged bark and thorns, so these attacks deal bludgeoning and piercing damage." alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Leafshifter's Aspect (Su)]{head icon=power ability="This ability functions as the *shifter aspect* ability of the standard shifter, except a leafshifter doesn't gain the minor forms of her aspects. Instead, whenever she gains a new aspect, she chooses one of the plant focus abilities from the ‹arc-hunter/plant master› hunter archetype (listed below) to associate with her new aspect. This choice cannot be changed once made." alter="Shifter aspect"}
::ab[Assassin Vine]{next icon=boost passive="The creature gains a +2 bonus on combat maneuver checks to ‹rule/grapple›." increment="This bonus~1~7~3"}

::ab[Brambles]{next icon=def passive="When the creature is hit by an unarmed strike or natural attack, the attacker takes 1 point of piercing damage." imp8="This increases to 2 points." imp15="This becomes 3 points."}
::ab[Creeping Vine]{next icon=boost passive="The creature gains a +4 competence bonus on Climb checks." increment="This bonus~1~7~6~2"}
::ab[Giant Flytrap]{next icon=boost passive="The creature gains a +4 competence bonus on Stealth checks." increment="This bonus~1~7~6~2"}
::ab[Mushroom]{next icon=def passive="The creature gains a +4 enhancement bonus on saves against poison." increment="This bonus~1~7~6~2"}
::ab[Oak]{next icon=def passive="The creature gains a +2 enhancement bonus to CMD." increment="This bonus~1~7~4~2"}

::ab[Shrieker]{next icon=power passive="The creature gains darkvision with a range of 60 feet." imp8="The range increases by 30 feet." imp15="The creature also gains ‹umr/blindsense› with a range of 10 feet."}
::ab[Spore]{next icon=boost passive="The creature gains a +4 competence bonus on Fly checks." increment="This bonus~1~7~6~2"}
::ab[Water Lily]{next icon=boost passive="The creature gains a +4 competence bonus on Swim checks." increment="This bonus~1~7~6~2"}

oozemorph.name: Oozemorph
description: ## Oozemorph
**Source** ‹source/Ultimate Wilderness« pg. 81›, [official Paizo FAQ](https://paizo.com/paizo/faq/v5748nruor1hj)

While most shifters are trained in druidic traditions that allow them to tap into animalistic powers, others look instead to the simplest forms of life for inspiration. Known as oozemorphs, these shifters focus on the ooze - a form of life as simple in construction as it is dangerous in combat. While some shifters consider the oozemorph to be unsettling or even vile, these shifters merely embrace a stranger form of life than most. They are not inherently evil, yet they are often misunderstood by druidic circles and these circles' shifter champions.
::ab[Weapon and Armor Proficiency]{icon=down info="An oozemorph is proficient with all simple weapons and light armor." replace="Weapon and armor proficiencies"}
::ab[Compression (Ex)]{icon=power ability="An oozemorph gains ‹umr/compression› as per the universal monster rule. This ability can be used regardless of the current form the oozemorph has taken."}

::ab[Fluidic Body (Su)]{icon=power-def-down replace="Chimeric aspect~greater chimeric aspect~wild shape~shifter aspect" useInc=shifter~2 useM=1 order=num info="An oozemorph's base form is not that of her race but rather that of a protoplasmic blob that has the same volume and weight. An oozemorph treats her creature type as both ‹type/ooze› and her base creature type from her race for the purposes of effects targeting creatures by type (such as ‹magic-enh/bane› weapons and a ranger's ‹ability/favored enemy›). In this form, the oozemorph is immune to critical hits and ‹misc/precision damage› and can't be flanked. However, she has no magic item slots and she cannot benefit from armor; cast spells; hold objects; speak; or use any magic item that requires activation, is held, or is worn on the body. An oozemorph reverts to this formless state whenever she is unconscious or in an area of antimagic. This is treated as a polymorph effect." move="An oozemorph can assume a humanoid form. This transformation is identical to ‹spell/alter self›, except for the base duration. Each hour after this duration, the oozemorph must succeed at a DC 15 Fortitude save or revert back to her fluidic body until she rests for at least 8 hours. This save DC increases by 1 for each additional hour spent maintaining the form. Ending this transformation at any time reverts the oozemorph back to her ooze form and renders her ‹misc/fatigued› for a number of minutes equal to the number of hours she maintained the form." imp8="The oozemorph can treat this ability as ‹spell/beast shape I›" imp15="She can treat this ability as ‹spell/beast shape II› or ‹spell/giant form I›." specialP="*Fluidic Body* is essentially two effects in one. The first, which is a permanent part of your character once you become an oozemorph, is that your base form is now an ooze shape. Even if you lose fluidic body for some reason (‹spell/antimagic field›, violating your code of conduct, etc) your base form is still the amorphous ooze-like form. The other half of the ability is a supernatural ‹spelldef/polymorph› effect to transform into humanoid (and later bestial) forms.~~~Despite having an ooze-like shape, an oozemorph's base form is not an ooze, though it does also count as an ooze for the purposes of effects targeting creatures by type. The ooze-like form doesn't gain any abilities of the ooze creature type except as stated by the archetype itself. This form retains the base senses and land speed of the oozemorph's original race, as well as racial abilities like ‹race/dwarf«s'› *greed* or ‹race/gnome«s'› *obsession* that don't depend on shape, but it loses abilities dependent on form, including form-based speeds like ‹race/strix«'s› flight (and most other racial speeds beyond land speed), racial natural attacks like ‹race/catfolk«s'› claws, and other abilities like ‹race/tiefling«s'› prehensile tail. However, if the oozemorph possesses a racial ability denied her in her ooze-like form and transforms into a member of her own race with fluidic body, she gains the full benefits of that racial ability for that duration, even if it isn't usually granted when using *alter self* (or the appropriate spell for a non-humanoid oozemorph). An oozemorph's compression, damage reduction, and morphic weaponry function in its ooze-like form and any form it takes via fluidic body, though not in forms it takes via other polymorph effects.~~~An oozemorph can carry items floating in its mass that are considered to be attuned. When it turns into a humanoid form via fluidic body, it can equip any number of those items (even armor, which usually takes time to don), leaving the rest on the ground in its space. If it turns into an animal via fluidic form, the items meld into the new form and grant some passive benefits, as normal for polymorph effects."}

::ab[Morphic Weaponry (Ex)]{flavor="An oozemorph can create a number of natural weapons to fight with from any portion of her body, regardless of her current form." icon=melee l=1 move="An oozemorph can form two primary natural attacks that each deal 1d6 points of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, chosen by the oozemorph when she forms them." swift="An oozemorph can change the damage type of any number of her natural weapons." order=mw repeat="An oozemorph gains an additional primary natural attack.~6~9" special="The total number of natural attacks an oozemorph has at any given time includes those gained via her current form. For example, an 8th-level oozemorph who has taken the form of a wolf with *beast shape I* has a bite attack as part of that form; she can create only two additional natural attacks via *morphic weaponry,* for a total of three attacks available to her at that level. If the oozemorph later reverts to a humanoid form with no natural weapons, she can instead create three *morphic weapons.*" replace="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Ooze Empathy (Ex)]{icon=down ability="An oozemorph gains the shifter's *wild empathy* class feature, but she can use it only to influence the attitude of oozes with an Intelligence score of 2 or lower. An oozemorph can use this ability on mindless oozes; when she does so, she imparts a modicum of intellect to the ooze to allow it to respond to her commands." alter="Wild empathy"}

::ab[Damage Reduction (Ex)]{l=2 icon=def passive="An oozemorph gains DR 4/slashing while unencumbered and either wearing no armor or wearing light nonmetal armor." incrementPlain="This damage reduction~0~4~6~2" replace="Defensive instinct"}
::ab[Clinging Ooze (Ex)]{l=4 icon=power ability="When in her natural form, an oozemorph gains a climb speed of 10 feet." replace="Woodland stride"}

rageshaper.name: Rageshaper
description: ## Rageshaper
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/82›

Not all shifters represent the balance of nature. The rageshaper is a destructive force of nature brought to bear - a wild and uncontrollable engine of annihilation fueled by wrath. Rageshapers fly into bloodletting frenzies and rain down devastation like unstoppable natural disasters.

::ab[Alignment]{icon=info-warning info="A rageshaper can be any nonlawful alignment. A rageshaper who becomes lawful cannot take any further levels in rageshaper, but he does not lose access to any rageshaper abilities he has already gained." alter=Alignment}

:::ab{icon=boost head action=Ability title="Devastating Form (Su)" replace="Wild shape~shifter aspect" imp10="The rageshaper can grow up to a maximum of two size categories larger with *devastating form* and his rage is now treated as *greater rage.*" imp20="The rageshaper can grow up to a maximum of three size categories larger with *devastating form* and his rage is treated as *mighty rage.*"}

A rageshaper can enter a state of intense fury, transforming into a living engine of destruction. This ability functions as the ‹class/barbarian«'s› rage class feature, except entering this state of fury requires a @HLfull-round_action that provokes attacks of opportunity and has additional effects as noted below. At the start of the rageshaper's next turn, he not only gains the benefit of *rage* but also grows one size category larger (though worn equipment and held items do not increase in size).

Armor or clothing the rageshaper wears that doesn't accommodate his changing size immediately gains the ‹misc/broken› condition. If insufficient room is available to accommodate this change, the rageshaper attains the maximum possible size for the available space and can attempt a Strength check (using his increased Strength) to burst any enclosures in the process. If the check fails, he is constrained but not harmed by the materials enclosing him.
[Look here](rule/adding_racial_hit_dice) for rules on attribute and skill bonuses and penalties due to a change of size.

A rageshaper can remain in his *devastating form* for a number of rounds per day equal to his shifter level. He can dismiss *devastating form* only with a successful Will save (DC = 10 + his shifter level) made as a @HLfree_action. On a failed save, the attempted remains in *devastating form* for an additional round. If the rageshaper does not successfully end his *devastating form* before he runs out of daily rounds, the next time he fails his Will save to revert, he flies into an uncontrollable frenzy as if affected by ‹spell/confusion›, but he treats a roll of 26-50 as "attacks nearest creature." Each round the rageshaper spends in an uncontrollable frenzy, the Will save DC to exit devastating form decreases by 2.

When a rageshaper ends his *devastating form* ability, he is ‹misc/fatigued› for a number of rounds equal to twice the number of rounds he spent in *devastating form.* A rageshaper cannot enter *devastating form* again while fatigued or exhausted. If a rageshaper falls unconscious, his *devastating form* ends immediately.

::ab[Rage (Ex)]{next icon=boost-down flavor="Relevant text from the barbarian ability." ability="You gain a +4 morale bonus to your Strength and Constitution, as well as a +2 morale bonus on Will saves. The increase to Constitution grants you 2 hit points per Hit Dice, but these disappear when the rage ends and are not lost first like ‹rule/temporary hit points›." order=ap passive="While in rage, you take a -2 penalty to Armor Class, and you cannot use any Charisma-, Dexterity-, or Intelligence-based skills (except Acrobatics, Fly, Intimidate, and Ride) or any ability that requires patience or concentration." special="Temporary increases to Constitution, such as those gained from rage and spells like ‹spell/bear's endurance›, do not increase the total number of rounds that a barbarian can rage per day. The total number of rounds of rage per day is renewed after resting for 8 hours, although these hours do not need to be consecutive."}

::ab[Greater Rage (Ex)]{next icon=boost-def flavor="Relevant text from the barbarian ability." passive="When you enter a *rage,* the morale bonus to your Strength and Constitution increase to +6 and the morale bonus on your Will saves increases to +3."}

::ab[Mighty Rage (Ex)]{next icon=boost-def flavor="Relevant text from the barbarian ability." passive="When you enter a *rage,* the morale bonus to your Strength and Constitution increase to +8 and the morale bonus on your Will saves increases to +4."}

::ab[Terrible Slam (Su)]{icon=melee ability="A rageshaper can deliver blows that demolish his foes. This functions as the *shifter claws* class ability, except his natural weapons are treated as slam attacks. Additionally, rather than granting the ability to bypass different kinds of damage reduction, the rageshaper's *terrible slam* ignores some of an object's hardness." imp1="*Terrible slam* ignores 5 points of an object's hardness." incrementPlain="This~0~5~10~5" incrementEnd=" points." alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Invulnerable Defenses (Ex)]{l=2 icon=def flavor="A rageshaper becomes difficult to harm in his *devastating form.*" passive="Whenever the rageshaper takes on his *devastating form* and is unencumbered and either wearing no armor or wearing light or medium nonmetal armor, he gains a +2 natural armor bonus to his AC and DR 2/-." replace="Defensive instinct~chimeric aspect~greater chimeric aspect"}

::ab[Unrestrained Stride (Ex)]{l=3 icon=boost-def ability="Whenever the rageshaper is in *devastating form,* he ignores movement penalties from ‹rule/difficult terrain› and is immune to the ‹rule/entangled› condition." replace="Woodland stride"}

::ab[Terrible Leap (Ex)]{l=5 icon=power move="When a rageshaper is in his *devastating form,* he can perform a *terrible leap* without attempting an Acrobatics check, jumping any distance up to his move speed (upward movement counts as double, as when flying)." useL=shifter replace="Trackless step"}

style_shifter.name: Style Shifter
description: ## Style Shifter
‹SOURCE Martial Arts Handbook/16›

Among the many warriors that train on Tian Xia's Wall of Heaven, a select few have been able to perfect their combat techniques to the point where they can augment a combat style by partially transforming into the creature that inspired it. These style shifters have honed their techniques and shared them with the rest of Golarion.
::ab[Armor Proficiency]{icon=down info="A style shifter is not proficient with medium armor or shields." alter="Armor proficiencies"}

::ab[Natural Strikes (Ex)]{icon=info info="A style shifter is considered to have ‹feat/Improved Unarmed Strike› for the purposes of feat prerequisites and can apply the effects of feats that have Improved Unarmed Strike as a prerequisite to her *shifter claws.*" alter="Shifter claws"}

::ab[Style Shifting (Ex)]{head icon=power ability="A style shifter gains access to *style aspects.* A style aspect provides benefits only while the style shifter is in the style feat stance associated with the appropriate aspect (such as ‹feat/Boar Style› with *Form of the Boar*)." useL=shifter3 useUnit=minute useNC=1 special="A style shifter can shift into a style aspect as a @HLfree_action as part of entering a style feat's stance. Otherwise, shifting into a style aspect is a @HLswift_action, while ending the effect is a @HLfree_action that can be taken only on the style shifter's turn. He can shift between any aspects he has during the duration without additional cost." replace="Shifter aspect~chimeric aspect~greater chimeric aspect~final aspect"}

::ab[Form of the Boar]{next icon=melee-lower ability="Once per round when you hit a single foe with two or more unarmed strikes, you can tear flesh. When you do, you deal an additional 1 point of ‹umr/bleed› damage with the attack." imp8="When you tear flesh, the target becomes ‹misc/sickened› for 1 round." imp15="Whenever you confirm a critical hit, you can attempt an ‹skill/Intimidate› check to demoralize a target within 30 feet as an @HLimmediate_action."}

::ab[Form of the Crane]{next icon=boost-def ability="You reduce the penalty on attack rolls for ‹misc/fighting defensively› by 1, to a minimum penalty of 0." imp8="When an attack misses you, you can move 5 feet as an @HLimmediate_action without provoking attacks of opportunity." imp15="When an attack misses you, you can move up to half your speed as an @HLimmediate_action without provoking attacks of opportunity."}

::ab[Form of the Dragon]{next icon=def-boost-lower ability="You gain a +1 dodge bonus to your AC for each ally you ‹rule/charge› through when charging, up to a total equal to your Dexterity modifier (minimum +0)." imp8="Your unarmed strike's damage die increases by one step against ‹misc/shaken› targets." imp15="Whenever you confirm a critical hit against a shaken target, the target becomes ‹misc/frightened› for 1 round."}

::ab[Form of the Monkey]{next icon=boost-lower ability="You gain a bonus on damage rolls while prone equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum +0)." order=am move="You can crawl up to half your speed." imp8="Whenever a creature provokes an attack of opportunity from you, that creature is considered ‹rule/flat-footed› against your attack." imp15="Whenever you take a 5-foot step, you are treated as if you were still in your original space for the purposes of ‹rule/flanking› others until the start of your next turn (though you can't use this aspect to provide flanking for yourself), and you can crawl up to your full speed as a @HLmove_action."}

::ab[Form of the Panther]{next icon=boost ability="You gain a bonus to damage rolls for retaliatory unarmed strikes made with Panther Style equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum +0)." imp8="This bonus increases to twice your Wisdom modifier." imp15="If a creature misses an attack of opportunity against you prompted by your movement through a threatened square, you can make a retaliatory unarmed strike against that creature, even if you would not normally be able to make any more retaliatory strikes this turn."}

::ab[Form of the Snake]{next icon=melee-lower ability="Once per round when you hit a single foe with two or more unarmed strikes and deal piercing damage on your turn, you knock that foe off-balance. The foe is flat-footed until the start of its turn." imp8="A foe you knock off-balance can't take attacks of opportunity until the start of its turn and remains flat-footed until the end of its turn." imp15="When you confirm a critical hit, the target is knocked off-balance and provokes attacks of opportunity from you and your allies."}

::ab[Form of the Snapping Turtle]{next icon=def ability="You double your shield bonus to AC from ‹feat/Snapping Turtle Style›." imp8="You still gain your shield bonus to AC from Snapping Turtle Style even when you don't have one hand free." imp15="There is a 10% chance that critical hits and sneak attacks fail to affect you. This stacks with the ‹magic-enh/light fortification› armor special ability and similar effects."}

::ab[Form of the Tiger]{next icon=melee ability="On a successful ‹rule/bull rush›, ‹rule/overrun›, or ‹rule/trip› combat maneuver, you deal slashing damage equal to your Strength bonus to the target of the maneuver." imp8="This damage increases to twice your Strength bonus." imp15="If you hit with two or more unarmed strikes and deal slashing damage on your turn, you also rend your target, dealing damage equal to your unarmed strike plus 1-1/2 your Strength bonus."}

::ab[Style Mastery (Ex)]{icon=power l1="A style shifter gains a bonus ‹main/style feat›." l5="A style shifter gains either a bonus style feat, or can instead gain a wildcard style slot. Whenever he enters one or more styles, he can spend his wildcard style slots to gain feats in those styles' feat paths (such as ‹feat/Panther Claw› if he enters ‹feat/Panther Style›) as long as he meets their prerequisites. Each time he changes styles, he can also change these wildcard style slots." repeat="He can gain another style feat or wildcard style slot.~10~5" special="If he chooses to gain a new style feat, he does not need to meet the prerequisites of it."}

::ab[Form of the Wild (Su)]{l=6 icon=magic ability="A style shifter gains the ability to turn into other creatures. This functions as a ‹class/druid«'s› *wild shape* ability, except he does not gain the ability to turn into an elemental. The shifter's effective druid level is equal to his class level." useInc=druid~3 useUnit=hour useNC=1 special="For abilities that function based on uses of *wild shape,* each hour of *form of the wild* counts as a use." alter="Wild shape"}

swarm_shifter.name: Swarm Shifter
description: ## Swarm Shifter
‹SOURCE Wilderness Origins/7›
Swarm shifters channel the essence of the basest and most overlooked animals, vermin.
::ab[Swarm]{icon=melee ability="A shifter that uses @HLalternate_natural_attacks can choose from Bite (B, P, S), Pincers (B), or Sting (P)."}

::ab[Vermin Aspect (Su)]{icon=power-def-boost swift="A swarm shifter can transform into a swarm of vermin. While in her vermin form, she gains a +2 bonus to natural armor. Her size increases by one size category (as ‹spell/enlarge person›, except her reach does not increase to 10 feet), but she can occupy the same space as a creature of any size. She must still attack a target as normal, even if occupying the same space as her target." useL=shifter3 useUnit=minute useNC=1 imp5="A swarm shifter becomes immune to ‹rule/bull rush›, ‹rule/grapple›, and ‹rule/trip› combat maneuvers while in vermin form." imp10="The swarm shifter's bonus to natural armor increases to +4 while in vermin form." imp15="A swarm shifter gains the ‹umr/distraction› universal monster ability while in vermin form." imp20="The swarm shifter becomes immune to critical hits and ‹rule/flanking› while in vermin form, but unlike a normal swarm, doesn't become immune to normal weapon damage." replace="Wild shape~shifter aspect"}

::ab[Swarmer (Su)]{l=4 icon=touch swift="While a swarm shifter is in her natural form, she can transform her hands into living vermin at will. This grants her a touch attack that deals 1d6 points of piercing damage and counts as an area attack for the purpose of overcoming the damage reduction of swarms. She doesn't add her Strength modifier as a bonus on damage rolls for this attack." incrementPlain="This damage~3~4" incrementEnd="d6." special="A swarm shifter can't use her normal *shifter claws* while her hands are transformed in this way." imp10="A swarm shifter can use this ability to automatically deal her touch attack damage to foes that she is grappling." imp15="A swarm shifter can use this ability while in her vermin form to automatically deal her touch attack damage to foes within her squares."}

::ab[Swarm Flow (Su)]{head l=9 icon=power ability="When a swarm shifter uses her *vermin aspect* ability, she gains a swarm ability from the list below. She can select a different ability each time she uses her *vermin aspect* ability." replace="Chimeric aspect"}
::ab[Crawling]{next icon=power ability="The swarm shifter gains a climb speed equal to her base speed."}
::ab[Flying]{next icon=power ability="The swarm shifter gains a fly speed equal to her base speed, with good maneuverability."}
::ab[Undulating]{next icon=power ability="The swarm shifter gains a burrow speed equal to her base speed."}

::ab[Greater Swarm Flow (Su)]{head l=14 icon=power ability="When using her *vermin aspect* ability, a swarm shifter also gains a greater swarm ability from the list below. She can select a different ability each time she uses her *vermin aspect* ability." replace="Greater chimeric aspect"}
::ab[Crawling]{next icon=power ability="The swarm shifter gains ‹umr/tremorsense› with a range of 60 feet and a +4 bonus on Perception checks."}
:::ab{next icon=melee title=Flying action=Ability}
The swarm shifter's claws change to venomous stingers that deliver poison on each attack.
::aff{iconP poison type=Claw-injury dcF dcLev="swarm shifter" dcIt=her dcMod=Con freqR=6 effDex="1d3" cure2c}

::ab[Undulating]{next icon=def passive="Whenever the swarm shifter is subject to a critical hit, she gains ‹umr/fast healing› equal to ‹misc/one-third› of her shifter level for a number of rounds equal to 3 + her Wisdom modifier."}

::ab[Final Aspect (Su)]{l=20 icon=magic ability="A swarm shifter becomes an embodiment of swarms and can cast ‹spell/swarm skin› as a spell-like ability at will with a caster level equal to her character level. She can separate into up to five swarms, regardless of the number of levels required per swarm. When transforming into swarms with this ability, the swarm shifter still selects swarm abilities granted by the *swarm flow* and *greater swarm flow* abilities to apply to her swarm forms. The chosen swarm abilities apply to all swarms." alter="Final aspect"}

verdant_shifter.name: Verdant Shifter
description: ## Verdant Shifter
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/83›

Verdant shifters have an affinity for plants rather than animals and gain a plant-like form that grows in power as they do. Verdant shifters are the enemies of creatures that would despoil the natural world, and they seek to maintain balance with civilization and industry to ensure the sanctity of wild spaces.
::ab[Speak with Plants (Sp)]{l=1 icon=magic useMod=Charisma3 ability="A verdant shifter gains the ability to cast ‹spell/speak with plants› as a spell-like ability." replace="Wild empathy"}

::ab[Verdant Body (Su)]{l=1 icon=power-def-boost ability="A verdant shifter takes on plant qualities as vines grow over her body, flowers bloom in her hair, and bark grows from her skin. The verdant shifter is treated as both her normal creature type and a plant creature for purposes of spells or effects that target a creature by type (such as ‹magic-enh/bane› weapons and a ranger's ‹ability/favored enemy›). *Verdant body* also grants the verdant shifter a 25% immunity to critical hits and ‹misc/precision damage› (such as ‹ability/sneak attack›)." imp5="The verdant shifter gains a +2 enhancement bonus to her Constitution score." imp8="The enhancement bonus to her Constitution score increases to +4 and her immunity to critical hits increases to 50%." imp15="The enhancement bonus her Constitution score increases to +6." replace="Shifter aspect"}

::ab[Wild Armor (Ex)]{l=2 icon=def passive="A verdant shifter gains a natural armor bonus to her AC while unencumbered and either wearing no armor or wearing light or medium nonmetal armor. This bonus is equal to 2 + ‹misc/one-fourth› of her shifter level." replace="Defensive instinct"}

::ab[Plant Shape (Su)]{l=6 icon=magic ability="A verdant shifter's *wild shape* ability instead functions as ‹spell/plant shape I›." useL=shifter imp12="This ability instead functions as ‹spell/plant shape II›." imp18="It functions as ‹spell/plant shape III›." special="This ability otherwise functions as the standard *wild shape* shifter class feature." alter="Wild shape" replace="Chimeric form~greater chimeric form"}

weretouched.name: Weretouched
description: ## Weretouched
‹SOURCE Ultimate Wilderness/83›
Weretouched shifters are scions of lycanthropic forces, whether hereditary or supernaturally imposed. They can assume both animal and hybrid forms, as a lycanthrope does.

::ab[Lycanthrope Aspect (Su)]{l=1 icon=down-def ability="A weretouched gains the *shifter aspect* ability, except the animal aspect chosen is the only animal aspect the weretouched can gain." special="This alters her other class features, as detailed in each relevant class feature. Otherwise, this ability functions identically to *shifter aspect.*" imp5="A weretouched gains DR/silver equal to ‹misc/half› her shifter level, to a maximum of DR 10/silver at 20th level. Additionally, a weretouched shifter becomes immune to a lycanthrope's ‹umr/curse of lycanthropy›." alter="Shifter aspect"}

::ab[Lycanthropic Empathy (Ex)]{l=1 icon=boost-down ability="A weretouched gains *wild empathy* and a +4 bonus on *wild empathy* checks, but this ability works only on the type of animal she chose for her lycanthrope aspect." alter="Wild empathy"}

::ab[Lycanthropic Wild Shape (Su)]{l=4 icon=down-power-boost ability="When a weretouched uses *wild shape,* she can assume only the form of an animal of the same type as her lycanthrope aspect. However, instead of assuming a major form, she can assume a hybrid form that mixes the traits of her natural form and the major form of her aspect. While in a hybrid form, she gain a +2 size bonus to her Strength score, a +2 natural armor bonus to her AC, and all of the natural attacks and abilities listed by her major form. A weretouched also counts as being in her natural form for the purpose of determining whether she can extend her *shifter claws.*" special="A weretouched's hybrid form is roughly the same size and shape as her natural form, albeit with bestial qualities such as digitigrade legs or shaggy fur, so her equipment does not merge into her new form when she shifts between her natural form and hybrid form. In addition, the size of a weretouched's hybrid form is the same as the size of her natural form. This otherwise counts as assuming a major form using *wild shape.*" alter="Wild shape"}

wild_effigy.name: Wild Effigy
description: ## Wild Effigy
‹SOURCE Construct Handbook/15›
A wild effigy still takes on the shapes of natural animals, but rather than transforming her body into flesh and muscle, she transforms into constructed effigies of her chosen aspects.

::ab[Armor Plating (Su)]{icon=power-def ability="A wild effigy's animal aspects are made out of carved, living rock. When a wild effigy is shifted into one of her minor or major aspects, she gains an enhancement bonus to natural armor and gains DR/adamantine equal to half her shifter level (minimum 1). The enhancement bonus is equal to 1 + ‹misc/one-fourth› of her shifter level." imp6="These bonuses also apply when the wild effigy is transformed into one of her aspects using *wild shape.*" replace="Wild empathy~track~woodland stride~trackless step"}

::ab[Heart of Earth (Su)]{l=4 icon=def flavor="A wild effigy's stone aspects no longer require even the semblance of flesh and blood to function." passive="When a wild effigy is shifted into a minor or major aspect, or is transformed into one of her aspects using *wild shape,* she adds her shifter level on checks to stabilize at negative hit points and gains a 25% chance to ignore a critical hit or ‹misc/precision damage›." special="This does not stack with the ‹magic-enh/fortification« armor property› or similar effects." imp9="This chance increases to 50% and she becomes immune to petrification." imp15="This chance increases to 75% and she becomes immune to ‹umr/bleed› and ‹umr/blood drain› effects." replace="Defensive instinct"}

::ab[Stoneclaw Strike (Su)]{l=6 icon=boost ability="A wild effigy can sacrifice minutes from her aspects' minor forms to turn her claws into adamantine. By expending a 1-minute increment of her shifter's minor aspect ability as a @HLswift_action, she can grant her *shifter's claws* the ability to ignore an amount of DR or hardness equal to her shifter level for 1 minute." usage="3 times per day"}
